deleteService.dialogDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the service. If you are sure please enter the service name to delete this service.
deleteService.confirmRich: To confirm, type <badge></badge> in the box below:
deleteService.deleteVolumesLabel: Delete volumes associated with this compose
deleteService.runningWarning: Cannot delete the service while it is running. Please wait for the build to finish and then try again.
